title: ArcT1k's cherry and ice pack
description:
This project is blue and pink themed it is also good for mace pvp and others. 

It has features like:
- Cit density and breach maces
- Low fire
- Low shield
- Small totem
- Custom gui and hearts also custom netherite tools and weapons. 
- New trim colours
body:
Hi this is my Pack **ArcT1k's Bubblegum texture pack** and please give me feedback and/or suggestions on what to do next. Also ive never posted or made a pack before so its my first attempt

This pack includes features like:

- animated totem
- Smaller totem and smaller totem pop
- smaller and lower shield
- cit maces that depend upon the breach or density enchant
- Custom GUI and Hearts
- Custom Pearls
- Custom Wind charges
- Custom expericene bottles
- Custom trims (changed the colours of lapis, iron, netherite and quartz)
- Custom Elytra
- Cyan enchant glint
- Smaller utils and 90% of things are smaller
- Custom trident 
- Custom crosshair and cooldown bar![showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04a6af7c3a82daaa0f20d641817e5813d31af751.png)![inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35fb84ca9470412c7a66d138fbc263ee9b532753.png)
